最近ちまたで噂になっている前線基地の娼婦『J』。<br>懸命な読者の皆さまならき: Rumors about a courtesan called 'J' at the Frontline Base are circulating. Our readers surely know that name.
その娼婦の与える快楽に屈さぬ者はおらず、<br>彼女に打ち勝った者もまた存在しな: It is said that no one can resist the pleasures she offers, and no one has ever bested her.
最強のいい女――それを目指す彼女は、<br>立ち向かってくる客を全て返り討ちにし: The ultimate woman—that is her goal. She defeats every client who dares to challenge her.
なにより刮目すべきは『今もなお成長し続けている』という情報だ。<br>その恐るべ: Most astounding is her continued improvement. Her fearsome sexual prowess draws all kinds of challengers.
最強の娼婦『J』の君臨する娼館――<br>そこでは、今夜も熱き性の狂宴が繰り広げ: At the brothel where the Strongest Prostitute, 'J,' reigns supreme—tonight, another fervent sexual frenzy rages on!
――っていう記事が出回ってるんです。<br>名前はイニシャルのようなんですけど…:
So there's an article making the rounds. The name's just an initial,
but... this is...?
どう考えてもワシじゃ！<br>なんでそんなことになっておる！？: It's me, plain as day! How in the world did this happen?
うぅーん、掲載されたのは信用できないゴシップ誌ではあるんですけど、<br>根拠も:
Hmm, it was in a dubious gossip mag, but I can't imagine they'd just
make it up. Any idea what brought this on?
そう言われてものう、ワシは普通に働いておっただけなのじゃが。<br>小僧とするま:
Well, even so, I was just doing my job as usual. Before I started with
the boy, I can't say I had much experience, you know...
まあ次に小僧を誘う前にもっといい女になって<br>満足させてやろうと努力はしてお:
Well, I was working to become a better woman and give him a good
time before I invited the boy again.
娼館での仕事中にあれこれと試したり、<br>客にその手の話をしたこともあるのう。:
I tried all sorts of things while working at the brothel, and even
talked about that kind of thing with customers.
……性技で勝ちたい相手がいて、腕を磨いてる……って話をしたんですね？<br>で、:
So you told them you were honing your skills to beat someone in bed?
And tried challenging services, right?
ま、間違ってはおらぬが……<br>その言い方だと、ワシがとてもエッチに聞こえるで:
Well, you're not wrong, but... when you put it like that, it makes me
sound awfully lewd...
私は軽く話を盛っただけですよ。<br>つまり、プロのゴシップ記者が今の話を聞けば:
I only spiced it up a bit. In other words, if a professional gossip
columnist heard that story...
……なるほどのう、最強の娼婦『J』が誕生するというわけじゃな。<br>ううむ、ち:
I see... so that's how the Strongest Prostitute, 'J', was born. Hmm,
maybe I went too far. I'll keep a low profile from now on...
……ワシに客、か。<br>どうにも嫌な予感がするんじゃが……: A client, for me? I've got a bad feeling about this...
まあ、これもお仕事ですから。頑張ってください、ね？: Well, it's part of the job. Good luck, alright?
分かっておる。きっちり仕事はしてやるわい。<br>まあ『J』などという噂を真に受:
I know. I'll do the job properly. After all, it might not be a customer
who took that rumor about 'J' seriously.
――と、言った側からこれか。<br>まあ、分かっておったわ、ほっほっほ。:
And just as I said that, this happens. Well, I knew it would, boy. Hoh
hoh hoh.
